name: has_tools-present-matches
note: A non-empty tools[] sets has_tools=true, so has_tools-rule matches.

name: has_tools-absent-no-match
note: No tools[] means has_tools=false, so has_tools-rule misses and it falls through to default.

messages.content: a plain prompt carrying no tools

name: has_tools-empty-array-no-match
note: An empty tools[] keeps has_tools=false (build_route_context requires a non-empty array), so it falls through to default.

messages.content: a prompt with an empty tools list

name: has_images-present-matches
note: An image_url content part sets has_images=true, so has_images-rule matches (has_tools-rule misses first).

name: has_images-absent-no-match
note: Text-only content means has_images=false, so has_images-rule misses and it falls through to default.

messages.content: a plain prompt carrying no images

name: has_images-input-image-responses-form
note: The Responses API input form: an input_image part sets has_images=true via the input branch of build_route_context, so has_images-rule matches.

name: has_images-earlier-turn-still-counts
note: has_images scans every message: an image in an earlier turn sets has_images=true even when the last user turn (the routing input) is text-only.
